3224900.name: Jagad Odyssey
3224900.description:
Jagad Odyssey explores the mysterious and folkloric story of Jagad and his revenge to avenge the death of his family. Armed with enormous physical strength, his kindness and also with the help of Ki Suro, Jagad must strive to gain the power equivalent to God's power to defeat Bathara, the longstanding devil lord in Nusantara.

Key features:

  • An All-New Folklore Experience: Explore dark and cruel temple yet mesmerizing mytical atmoshpere of all places in Nusantara.

  • A Turning Point: Experience Jagad's intense growth and origin story from a common villager to an enormous hero.

  • Fight to survive: Upgrade Jagad's strength and ability and salvage ancient relics to defeat Bathara.
3224900.supported_languages:
印度尼西亚语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
